exports.name: I18N
exports.description: Main i18n class for internationalization of Gravity UI services. Manages keysets (translation dictionaries) per language, supports pluralization via Intl.PluralRules, parameter interpolation with {{param}} syntax, and translation nesting with $t{key} syntax.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Optional configuration object with lang, fallbackLang, data, and logger fields

methods.name: setLang
methods.description: Sets the active language for translation lookups

methods.name: setFallbackLang
methods.description: Sets the fallback language used when a key is missing in the active language

methods.name: configurePluralization
methods.description: @deprecated Plurals automatically used from Intl.PluralRules. You can safely remove this call. Will be removed in v2.

methods.name: registerKeyset
methods.signature: registerKeyset(lang: string, keysetName: string, data?: KeysData): void
methods.description: Registers a single named keyset of translations for a given language

methods.name: registerKeysets
methods.description: Registers all keysets in a KeysetData object for a given language

methods.name: has
methods.signature: has(keysetName: string, key: string, lang?: string): boolean
methods.description: Returns true if the given key exists in the specified keyset for the current (or provided) language

methods.name: i18n
methods.signature: i18n(keysetName: string, key: string, params?: Params): string
methods.description: Looks up and returns the translated string for a key in a keyset. Supports parameter interpolation with {{param}} syntax and falls back to fallbackLang if configured.

methods.name: keyset
methods.signature: keyset<TKey extends string = string>(keysetName: string): (key: TKey, params?: Params) => string
methods.description: Returns a bound translation function scoped to the given keysetName, so callers do not need to repeat the keyset name

methods.name: warn
methods.signature: warn(msg: string, keyset?: string, key?: string): void
methods.description: Emits a warning via the configured logger (level: info)

methods.name: getLanguageData
methods.description: Returns the registered KeysetData for the given language (or the current lang if not provided)

exports.name: I18NFn
exports.signature: type I18NFn<T = any> = { (keysetName: K, key: G | NoEnumLikeStringLiteral<S>, params?: {[key: string]: any}): string; keyset<K extends keyof T>(keysetName: K): (key: G | ..., params?: ...) => string; i18n<K, G, S>(...): () => string; has<K>(...): () => boolean; bind(...): ...; }
exports.description: Typed function interface for i18n lookups. Cast i18nInstance.i18n to I18NFn<typeof Keysets> to get keyset- and key-level type checking. Supports direct call, keyset(), i18n(), has(), and bind() overloads up to the third argument.

exports.name: TypedParamsI18NFn
exports.signature: type TypedParamsI18NFn<T = any> = { (keysetName: K, key: G | NoEnumLikeStringLiteral<S>, params?: TypedParams<T[K][G]>): string; keyset<K extends keyof T>(keysetName: K): (...) => string; i18n<K, G, S>(...): () => string; has<K>(...): () => boolean; bind(...): ...; }
exports.description: Like I18NFn but additionally types the params argument based on the {{param}} placeholders present in the translation value, using TypedParams<T[K][G]>.

exports.name: TypedParams
exports.signature: type TypedParams<K = string | PluralValue, V = string | number> = K extends string ? Record<KeyParam<K>, V> : K extends PluralValue ? Record<KeyParam<...all plural forms...>, V> & { count: number } : unknown
exports.description: Derives the required params Record type from a translation string or PluralValue by extracting all {{param}} placeholder names. For plural values also requires a count field.

exports.name: Params
exports.description: Loose key-value dictionary passed to i18n() for parameter interpolation ({{param}} substitution).

exports.name: Pluralizer
exports.signature: type Pluralizer = (count: number, pluralForms: typeof PluralForm) => PluralForm
exports.description: Deprecated. Custom pluralization function signature. Accepts a count and the PluralForm enum, returns the appropriate PluralForm value.

exports.name: PluralForm
exports.signature: enum PluralForm { One, Few, Many, None }
exports.description: Deprecated enum used with the old array-based plural format. One = singular, Few = paucal, Many = other/many, None = zero.

exports.name: PluralValue
exports.signature: type PluralValue = { zero?: string; one?: string; two?: string; few?: string; many?: string; other?: string; }
exports.description: Object-based plural translation value following CLDR plural categories. Use this instead of the deprecated DeprecatedPluralValue array format. The other field is the required fallback form for all languages.

exports.name: DeprecatedPluralValue
exports.description: @deprecated Old array-based plurals format. Array of 4 strings corresponding to PluralForm enum values [One, Few, Many, None]. Use PluralValue object format instead. Will be removed in v2.

exports.name: KeyData
exports.description: The value type for a single translation key: either a plain string, the deprecated array plural format, or the current object plural format.

exports.name: KeysData
exports.description: A flat dictionary of translation keys to their values within a single named keyset.

exports.name: KeysetData
exports.description: A dictionary mapping keyset names to their KeysData. This is the shape of a full language file passed to registerKeysets().

exports.name: Logger
exports.signature: interface Logger { log(message: string, options?: { level?: string; logger?: string; extra?: Record<string, unknown> }): void; }
exports.description: Interface for a logger to receive i18n warnings. Pass an instance as the logger option to the I18N constructor. Warnings are always emitted at level 'info' with extra.type = 'i18n'.

exports.name: isPluralValue
exports.signature: function isPluralValue(value: KeyData): value is DeprecatedPluralValue | PluralValue
exports.description: Type guard that returns true when the given KeyData value is a plural form (array or object) rather than a plain string.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The translation key value to test
